results.rendered_html:
chāga a. (gī f.) Relating to a goat or she-goat;  Y. 1. 258. 
— gaḥ (gī f.)
1 A goat; brāhmaṇaśchāgato yathā (vaṃcitaḥ)  H. 4. 53 ;  Ms. 3. 269. 
2 The sign Aries of the zodiac.
— gaṃ
1 The milk of a she-goat.
2 An oblation.
Comp.
— bhojin m. a wolf.
— mukhaḥ an epithet of Kārtikeya.
— rathaḥ, -vāhanaḥ an epithet of Agni, the god of fire.
